context.audience: Indie hackers shipping their first SaaS, startup CTOs scaling their product, developers adding subscription billing to existing apps
pain_points: Choosing a billing provider and integrating subscription logic without over-engineering
Authentication, multi-tenancy, and permission models at scale
Reducing AI API costs while maintaining product quality
Churn prediction and retention tooling without a dedicated data team
GDPR and data privacy compliance for European customers
content_that_works: SaaS boilerplate and starter kit comparisons
